title: heleniastrum puberulum
intro: Heleniastrum puberulum, also known as Indian gentian or Gentianella alpina, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an expectorant, helping to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Heleniastrum puberulum include its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as diabetes and gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Heleniastrum puberulum can be made into teas, tinctures, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
